title: Nio earnings preview: Here's what to watch for Q4 2023 report
text: Deutsche Bank analyst Edison Yu's team expects Nio Q4 2023 performance with expected revenue of RMB 16.9 billion against analyst consensus of RMB 16.8 billion. Expected R&D spending RMB 3-3.5 billion. Analysts project vehicle margin over 13% (up from Q3's 11%) and gross margin approximately 10% (vs. Q3's 8%). For Q1 2024 outlook, analysis suggests Nio management likely to guide for deliveries of mid 20,000 units, representing a significant decline. Analysts note Nio faces regional limitations, with strong Shanghai performance but weaker results elsewhere, and faces difficulty converting premium vehicle customers from traditional automakers. Nio delivered 50,045 vehicles in Q4, exceeding guidance of 47,000-49,000 units.
